data.title: New Found Gold confirms high-grade core in Iceberg excavation channel sampling. (characters: 78)
data.description: Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, on September 25, 2025, New Found Gold Corp. revealed the outcomes of a channel sampling initiative at the Iceberg excavation within the AFZ Core region. The company, traded under the ticker symbols TSXV: NFG and NYSE-A: NFGC, disclosed the findings of the program at the site.

data.title: Cadence Bank sponsors SIAC Conference, furthers vision of prosperity. Named official banking sponsor. (Characters: 94)
data.description: Cadence Bank (NYSE: CADE) has been appointed as the official banking sponsor of the conference in Atlanta on September 25, 2025. This sponsorship aligns with Cadence's mission to promote the prosperity of individuals, businesses, and communities. As part of this partnership, Cadence will support the Southern Intercollegiate Athletic Conference, showcasing its commitment to fostering growth and success.
Medicenna releases results from latest shareholder meeting; details in company announcement.

data.title: Realty Income prices $800 million dual-tranche offering of senior unsecured notes with 3.950% due 2029.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in San Diego, Realty Income Corporation (NYSE: O), known as The Monthly Dividend Company®, revealed the details of its latest financial move. The company successfully priced a public offering totaling $400 million for 3.950% senior unsecured notes set to mature on February 1, 2029, also referred to as the "2029 notes." Alongside this, another $400 million worth of undisclosed notes were also part of the offering.

data.title: Stock market falls for third consecutive day, Dow Jones lower. IBM surges on quantum bets. Oracle and Tesla see sell-offs.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index closed with a decrease, as Wall Street reacted to unexpected figures for GDP and unemployment claims. Both Oracle and Tesla experienced declines in their stock prices. This marks the third consecutive day of losses for the stock market indexes. On a positive note, IBM saw a significant increase in value due to its investments in quantum technology.

data.title: Chemtrade Logistics Income Fund (TSX: CHE.UN) to purchase up to 11,231,131 of its units with new automatic securities purchase plan.
data.description: Chemtrade Logistics Income Fund (TSX: CHE.UN) revealed its latest move on September 25, 2025. The Fund disclosed entering into an automatic securities purchase plan (ASPP) with its designated broker in relation to its ongoing normal course issuer bid (NCIB). The NCIB aims to buy back up to 11,231,131 of its units. This strategic financial decision reflects Chemtrade's commitment to enhancing shareholder value and optimizing its capital structure.

data.title: Lamb Weston Holdings announces $0.37/share quarterly dividend, payable on Nov 28, 2025, to stockholders as of Oct 31.
data.description: In Eagle, Idaho, the Board of Directors of Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LW) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.37 per share for their common stock. This dividend will be paid on November 28, 2025, to shareholders of record as of October 31, 2025. Lamb Weston, a major frozen potato product supplier globally, has been in operation for 75 years and is known for its innovative contributions to the industry.

data.title: Verizon set to offer Meta Ray-Ban Display glasses, pioneering new AI tech for connectivity on-the-go.
data.description: Cutting-edge AI glasses are set to launch for Verizon customers, providing an innovative method for staying connected while on the move. This groundbreaking technology offers a seamless way for users to access information and communicate hands-free, with an estimated release date in six months. Priced at $300, these AI glasses will revolutionize the way individuals interact with their surroundings.

data.title: Litecoin aims for $137 rebound by October despite bearish trend; predicted 4-week recovery at $137.34 due to oversold conditions and strong $100.25 support.
data.description: According to current predictions, the price of LTC is expected to increase and hit $137.34 in the next four weeks. This potential recovery is supported by oversold market conditions and a strong support level at $100.25, indicating a possible bullish trend continuation.

data.title: HGreg is finalist in Dunamis competition in two categories - Company of the Year – Export and Technologies and Innovation.
data.description: A company in Montréal, HGreg, has been named a finalist in the Dunamis competition by the Laval Chamber of Commerce and Industry. They are nominated in two key categories: Company of the Year – Export and Technologies and Innovation. This recognition showcases the company's prowess in innovation and success in a dynamic industry. In the Export category, HGreg is commended for its creative approach in entering new markets, leading to substantial commercial growth. The Technologies and Innovation nomination emphasizes their commitment to advancing in these areas.

data.title: Michael Saylor's social media stirs Bitcoin debate, adding fuel to a controversial proposal among enthusiasts.
data.description: Michael Saylor's recent social media posts have intensified a debate within the Bitcoin community. This has led to increased discussions among Bitcoin enthusiasts.

data.title: Lisa Cook pleads for staying at Fed, deeming fraud claims weak. Ex-Fed chairs & Treasury secretaries support, citing risk to bank’s autonomy.
data.description: Previous Federal Reserve chairpersons and United States Treasury secretaries have expressed their support for the continued tenure of Ms. Cook. They emphasized the importance of preserving public trust in the central bank's autonomy and urged for her retention in the interim period.
